sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: CoStar Data Shows Aire Park Driving New Rental Highs in Leeds
feed.summary: New data from CoStar indicates that Aire Park in Leeds's East Quarter is driving a significant shift in office demand and rental activity. The East Quarter's share of headline leasing activity increased to 30% in 2025, attracting professional and financial services firms due to new-build specifications, strong ESG credentials, and proximity to the city center. Despite an overall stable CBD vacancy rate, Aire Park's transactions were primarily mid-sized lettings, signaling its growing influence on the Leeds office market.

feed.title: Netflix, State Street And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Friday

State Street Corp. and Truist Financial Corp. are expected to report quarterly earnings, while Alcoa Corp. and Knight-Swift Transportation Holdings Inc. reported disappointing results.

feed.title: Redwire lands US Marine Corps deal for Stalker Block 30 drones
feed.summary: Redwire Corporation has secured over $20 million in new orders from the US Marine Corps for its advanced navigation variant of the Stalker Block 30 uncrewed aircraft system (UAS). These systems will enhance situational awareness and target tracking for intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance missions, especially in contested electronic warfare environments. This procurement adds to the nearly 250 Stalker aircraft already in use by the Marine Corps, acquired through a Defense Logistics Agency contract with Atlantic Diving Supply as the prime contractor.

feed.title: Cadence, NVIDIA Expand Partnership to Accelerate Agentic AI, Simulation and Digital Twin Workflows
feed.summary: Cadence and NVIDIA are expanding their partnership to accelerate agentic AI, physics-based simulation, and digital twin-driven engineering workflows. This collaboration aims to boost productivity in semiconductor design, physical AI systems, and hyperscale AI factories by integrating Cadence's EDA and SDA technologies with NVIDIA CUDA-X, AI physics, and Omniverse libraries. The partnership includes developments such as Cadence's AgentStack for orchestrating design workflows and the integration of NVIDIA Omniverse DSX Blueprint for optimizing large-scale AI factory digital twins.

feed.title: International Paper to acquire North Pacific Paper Company for $360m
feed.summary: International Paper has agreed to acquire North Pacific Paper Company (NORPAC) from One Rock Capital Partners for $360m. The acquisition aims to enhance International Paper's operational flexibility, reduce costs, and expand its capacity to meet demand for lightweight recycled containerboard. NORPAC operates a paper mill in Longview, Washington, with three paper machines and an annual output of about one million tonnes of containerboard and other paper grades.

feed.title: BMO Capital downgrades Exelon stock rating on regulatory concerns
feed.summary: BMO Capital downgraded Exelon (NASDAQ:EXC) to Market Perform from Outperform and reduced its price target to $49.00 from $52.00 due to regulatory concerns following PECO’s withdrawal of electric and gas rate cases. Despite this, Exelon's management expects earnings per share growth near the top end of its 5-7% outlook through 2029 and has a strong track record of dividend payments for 56 consecutive years. The firm anticipates the stock will remain rangebound in the intermediate term, acknowledging the company's strategies to manage the impact of regulatory developments.

feed.title: Oportun Financial (OPRT) Stock Surges 12% In Pre-Market On Friday: Here's What Is Happening
feed.summary: Oportun Financial (OPRT) shares surged 12.02% in pre-market trading after announcing Doug Bland as the new CEO, effective April 20. Bland, with extensive experience from PayPal and Bank of America, is expected to bring disciplined credit management to the company. Despite an earlier price target trim by JP Morgan, OPRT's stock has seen a 15.84% gain over the past year.
